# 2D Projection Local

**Path:** `local_descriptor/handcrafted/2d_projection`

Handcrafted local descriptors computed from spherical-view, BEV, range-image, or other 2D projections.

## Scope

**Include:** spherical-view local feature; BEV local feature

**Exclude:** whole-image global descriptors
